item.title: Here’s the latest.
item.description: The avalanche struck a guided backcountry skiing group near Truckee, Calif., near the end of a multiday trip, officials said. Six skiers have been res...

item.title: Talks on Russia-Ukraine War Enter 2nd Day in Geneva
item.description: The discussions in Geneva were expected to focus on territorial issues, a major sticking point, but the short duration suggests major progress was not...

item.title: Russia’s Exile From World Sports Will End Next Month at Paralympics
item.description: Six Russian athletes and four Belarusians will be allowed to represent their nations, officials said. The decision could pave the way for a Russian te...

item.title: The Behind the Scenes Search for Compromise on Territory in Ukraine Talks
item.description: The latest round of talks ended with no indication of progress, but negotiators are bargaining over who will control land in eastern Ukraine if they r...

item.title: Billy Preston’s Music Was ‘Pure Joy.’ But His Life Ended in Tragedy.
item.description: The Beatles’ beloved collaborator died at 59 in 2006. A new documentary, “That’s the Way God Planned It,” explores what he long kept hidden.
